description: Study the lived experience of students or learners inside the broader institution, not just the course itself.

examples: We need feedback on the overall student experience across support, administration, and belonging.
Help us understand whether learners feel supported by the institution.

nodes.label: Expectation versus reality
nodes.description: Map how the lived institutional experience compares with what learners expected or were promised.

nodes.label: Administrative friction
nodes.description: Capture operational friction such as registration, communication, scheduling, or support access.

nodes.label: Belonging and care
nodes.description: Understand whether learners feel seen, supported, and respected.

nodes.label: Help-seeking experience
nodes.description: Assess what happened when participants needed help and how responsive the institution felt.

nodes.label: Retention risk signals
nodes.description: Identify moments or patterns that could contribute to disengagement or attrition.
